message:
dashboard: add issue-to-merge time metric with sparkline (#176)

Add a new "avg fix time" stat to the Governor section that measures
how long it takes from when a GitHub issue is filed to when a PR
that fixes it is merged. The metric scans the last 100 merged PRs
for Fixes/Closes/Resolves #N references, fetches issue creation
times, and computes avg/median/p90/min/max durations.

Server-side:
- New collector runs every 15 min with rate-limited batch fetching
- Caches results to /var/run/hive-metrics/issue_to_merge.json
- Includes 6-hour bucketed history for sparklines (30 day window)
- Graceful error handling — keeps stale cache on API failures
- Data flows through SSE statusCache and persistentHistory snapshots

Client-side:
- New formatFixTime() helper for human-readable durations
- Yellow sparkline (#d29922) using 6-hour history buckets
- Hover tooltip shows median, p90, fastest, slowest, and count

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
